media_title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts

characters.name: Alpha Dad
characters.description: Alpha DadCharacter InformationAliasesAlpha DadGenderMale ♂SpeciesMute(Wolf)OccupationPack LeaderMaritalWidowedResidenceLas VistasBackground InformationFirst AppearanceMute-Eat-Mute WorldVoiced byMatt LoweTheAlpha Dadwas one of twomutewolf parents and pack leaders who adopted Wolf and ultimately deceived her. On August 31st, 2021, Rad Sechrist tweeted a part of his Wolf movie script reveal that the Alpha's name is Charles.[1] Like most of his pack, he possesses a dark bluish grey coat with a white mask connected to a white underbelly. The tips of his ears are black. He wears a pink sweatshirt tied around his neck over a light-pink collared shirt and a red bow tie. He also wears a black belt on beige chino shorts. His eyes are pink with small rectangular pupils.
characters.media_title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts

On August 31st, 2021, Rad Sechrist tweeted a part of his Wolf movie script reveal that the Alpha's name is Charles.[1] Like most of his pack, he possesses a dark bluish grey coat with a white mask connected to a white underbelly. The tips of his ears are black. He wears a pink sweatshirt tied around his neck over a light-pink collared shirt and a red bow tie. He also wears a black belt on beige chino shorts. His eyes are pink with small rectangular pupils.

characters.name: Alpha Mom
characters.description: Alpha MomCharacter InformationFull NameUnknownAliasesAlpha MomGenderFemale ♀SpeciesMute(Wolf)OccupationPack LeaderResidenceLas VistasStatusDeceasedBackground InformationOnly AppearanceMute-Eat-Mute World(flashback)Voiced byGrey GriffinTheAlpha Momwas one of two mute wolf parents and pack leaders who adoptedWolfand who ultimately deceived her. Like her pack, she possesses a bluish grey coat with a white mask connected to a white underbelly. The tips of her ears are black. She wears a pearl necklace and a pink jacket over a collared black shirt and a matching black pencil skirt. Soft-spoken and formal, she seems to lean more toward a calm and collected personality. She is also shown to be quite manipulative, having duped Wolf into trusting her through the time they've lived together with the family pack, and ultimately betraying her by revealing her as the family prey.
characters.media_title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts

characters.name: Benson Mekler
characters.description: Benson MeklerDebutCurrentChildCharacter InformationAge7(Requiem for a Dave, flashback)15("Benson and the Beast" flashback)16("Explosion Berries" to "Age of the Wonderbeasts")[1]21("Age of the Wonderbeasts" onwards)SpeciesHumanOccupationOwner of BenstaurantRelationshipsDave(best friend)Kipo Oak(friend)Wolf(friend)Mandu(friend)Troy Sandoval(boyfriend)Dahlia Berdacs(friend)Asher Berdacs(friend)Lio Oak(friend)Song Oak(friend)Hugo Oak(friend)Earl Berdacs(friend)Lily Berdacs(friend)Doug(friend)Houg(friend)Zane(friend)Jamack(ally)Yumyan Hammerpaw(ally)Molly YarnChopper(ally)Cotton(friend)Camille(friend)Brad(friend)Amy(friend)Emilia(enemy)ResidenceLas VistasLikesMusicFlapjacksExplosion Berry ColaFoodCheeseRatlandFrosty BeveragesTroyDislikesBeing ChasedDyingBeing KidnappedOld Dave’s paranoid behaviorThe destruction of RatlandBackground InformationFirst Appearance"Explosion Berries"Latest Appearance"Age of the Wonderbeasts"Voiced byCoy StewartBenson Mekleris a self-assured human scavenger who lives on the surface with his long time best friendDaveand offers to helpKipofind her way home. Benson is a male teenage human with dark skin, short spiky black hair, and brown eyes. He wears a lilac button-up shirt layered under an off-white sweater with a graphic of a cat head on the chest and a slight tear near the collar, light brown pants, and black, cyan, and white sneakers. He accessorizes the look with a pale-green baseball cap and teal and magenta robot backpack. Like most remaining human survivors, Benson is smart, resourceful, and cunning (enough to outwitWolf'straps). Different from Wolf, Benson is far more adaptable to change and willing to cooperate with and befriend others. He has a strong sense of self and is incredibly forthright when it comes to recognizing and communicatinghislimits but can be less sensitive to others. He has no problem lying his way out of a sticky situation, opting out of a risky one, or communicating his own sexual orientation. He is very music-motivated, and his cassette player serves as the show's go-to action soundtrack.
characters.media_title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts

characters.name: Cappuccino
characters.description: CappuccinoCharacter InformationGenderFemale ♀SpeciesMute(Shrimp)OccupationRestaurant OwnerRelationshipsHarriet(Pet)Kipo(ally)ResidenceBrunchington BeachLikesHer three rules being followedDislikesHumans(formerly)Background InformationFirst Appearance"The Ballad of Brunchington Beach"Latest Appearance"Age of the Wonderbeasts"Voiced byKarly Rothenberg Cappuccinois a mute shrimp and proprietor of the restaurant Brunchington Beach. She is currently an ally to Kipo and her friends. Cappuccino is a large, light-blue mute shrimp with black eyes and yellow irises. She wears a white shirt with a black apron and pants. Across her the left side of her back and tail, she has several cooking related tattoos (a fork, a spatula, a toque, a seasoning shaker, and a cleaver).

characters.name: Charles
characters.description: CharlesCharacter InformationGenderMale ♂SpeciesMute(Butterfly)ResidenceForest CanopyBackground InformationFirst Appearance"Real Cats Wear Plaid"Latest Appearance"Song ReMix"Charlesis a mute butterfly thatYumyan Hammerpawbelieved to be inhabited by the spirit of the Timbercats' stolenScratching Tree. Charles is an enourmous butterfly with large pink eyes, aqua thorax and abdomen, and pink, purple, blue, and aqua gradient wings. Charles is a placid, shy creature of few words. He entertains Yumyan in what he perceives as a game of chase, but is only willing to settle down whenKiposits and waits patiently for Charles to approach first.
characters.media_title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts

characters.name: Dave
characters.description: DaveAdultBuffOldLarvaGrubTeenCharacter InformationAliasesDave the Bug(full name, possibly)Mute(by Wolf and Emilia)Grub Baby(as a Larva)Man Bug(by Dahlia)Stupid Bug Man(by Robot T-Shirt Guy)SquiggleBabyMan(byFun Gus)Mr. Gorgeous(by himself)Lil PoundCake(by himself)Genius(by himself, Wolf, and Benson)AgeOver 200GenderMale ♂SpeciesMute(Insect)OccupationSurface Survivor(formerly)Lecture Tutor(currently)RelationshipsBenson Mekler(best friend)Kipo Oak(friend)Mandu(friend)Wolf(friend)Lio Oak(friend)Song Oak(friend)Hugo Oak(friend)Troy Sandoval(friend)Dahlia Berdacs(friend)Asher Berdacs(friend)Roberto Sandoval(friend)Earl Berdacs(friend)Lily Berdacs(friend)Jamack(ally)Hoag(friend)Yumyan Hammerpaw(friend/ally)Molly Yarnchopper(friend/ally)Brad(friend)Amy(friend)Label(friend)Carton(friend)Tongue Depressor(friend)Good Billions(friend)Cappuccino(enemy turn to friend)Zane(friend)Gerard(former enemy, possibly)Dave(friend)Dave(friend)David(neutral)Dr. Dave(friend)Emilia(enemy)Fun Gus(enemy)ResidenceLas VistasLikesBensonFriendsFoodMusicFunBrunchCheeseFrench FriesCalling French Fries “Potato Noodles”Having Full Control of his Molting AbilityDislikesDangerFighting(formerly)Molting out of his musclesNot having friendsMandugnawing on himselfNot grabbing French Fries when talking about themBackground InformationFirst Appearance"Burrow Girl"Latest Appearance"Age of the Wonderbeasts"Voiced byDeon Cole Daveis a constantly metamorphosing bugmute. He is a surface scavenger along with his human partnerBenson. Dave has six different stages in his regenerative life cycle: a larva, a grub, an awkward teen, an adult, mega-buff hero mode, and a decrepit senior citizen.

He currently holdsEmiliaprisoner after she was defeated by Kipo and her friends. Fun Gus is comprised of an orange mute fungus that completely covers the inside of the burrow he resides in. He has glowing cyan eyes and can change his form at will.
